title: strychnos coriacea
intro: Strychnos coriacea, also known as the Coriacea tree or Yellow Coriacea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Loganiaceae, native to tropical Africa. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Strychnos coriacea include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas and extracts, which are often used in traditional African medicine to treat various ailments.
